title: Deliver complete, clean, runnable source code for the full luxury e-commerce app

requirements.text: Ensure the Motoko backend (backend/main.mo) is complete and runnable: all types (Product, User, Cart, Wishlist, Order, Review) are fully defined, all CRUD query and update endpoints are implemented with no stubs or placeholders, role-based admin access control is enforced, and the file compiles without errors.

quotes: Complete code for all files (no missing parts)

acceptanceCriteria: backend/main.mo compiles cleanly with no errors or warnings
All Product, User, Cart, Wishlist, Order, and Review types are fully defined
Every public query and update function referenced by the frontend exists and has a complete implementation
Admin-only functions reject calls from non-admin principals
All functions have inline comments explaining their purpose and logic

requirements.text: Ensure every frontend source file is complete and runnable: all React components, pages, hooks, and utilities contain full implementations with no TODO placeholders, type errors, or missing imports. The app must compile with `tsc --noEmit` passing cleanly.

quotes: Complete code for all files (no missing parts)

acceptanceCriteria: TypeScript compilation passes with zero errors
No component file contains TODO, placeholder, or stub implementations
All imports resolve to existing modules or packages
Every page component renders without runtime errors in the browser
All hooks (useQueries, useActor) correctly wire to the Motoko backend candid interface

requirements.text: Ensure the full project structure is present and well-organized: backend/main.mo, frontend/index.html, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/App.tsx, all page files under frontend/src/pages/, all component files under frontend/src/components/, all hook files under frontend/src/hooks/, all utility files under frontend/src/utils/, frontend/index.css, frontend/src/index.css, frontend/tailwind.config.js, and any configuration files (dfx.json, package.json, tsconfig.json) must exist and be correctly configured.
acceptanceCriteria: dfx.json correctly declares frontend and backend canisters
package.json lists all required dependencies with correct versions
tsconfig.json is correctly configured for the React + TypeScript stack
All directories and files listed in all_files_summary.json are present
Running `npm install` followed by `dfx deploy` completes without errors

requirements.text: Add a comprehensive README.md at the project root with step-by-step setup and run instructions covering: prerequisites (Node.js, DFX SDK versions), installation (`npm install`), local replica startup (`dfx start`), canister deployment (`dfx deploy`), accessing the frontend URL, configuring the admin principal, and a brief description of all major features.

quotes: Include step-by-step setup and run instructions

acceptanceCriteria: README.md exists at the project root
Prerequisites section lists required Node.js and DFX SDK versions
Step-by-step commands are provided for install, start, and deploy
Admin principal configuration is explained
All major app features are briefly described
Any assumptions made during development are documented in the README

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All backend logic must remain in a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo
Do not introduce any external databases, cloud services, or unsupported third-party integrations
nonGoals: Adding new features beyond what is already specified in the existing feature set
Migrating to a different frontend framework or backend language
Integrating external payment gateways (only UI flow for UPI/card/wallet/COD is in scope)
Mobile native app packaging (React Native, Flutter, etc.)
